iotsitewise.gateway.GatewayCapabilitySum.Docs: A list of gateway capability summaries that each contain a namespace and status. Each gateway capability defines data sources for the gateway. To retrieve a capability configuration's definition, use [DescribeGatewayCapabilityConfiguration](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot-sitewise/latest/APIReference/API_DescribeGatewayCapabilityConfiguration.html).

iotsitewise.gateway.GatewayName.Docs: A unique, friendly name for the gateway.  The maximum length is 256 characters with the pattern `[^u0000-u001Fu007F]+`.

iotsitewise.gateway.GatewayPlatform.Docs: The gateway's platform. You can only specify one platform in a gateway.

iotsitewise.gateway.Tags.Docs: A list of key-value pairs that contain metadata for the gateway. For more information, see [Tagging your AWS IoT SiteWise resources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot-sitewise/latest/userguide/tag-resources.html) in the *AWS IoT SiteWise User Guide*.
